top_signals.title: Oil prices mixed as fresh U.S.-Iran clashes reignite Middle East supply fears
top_signals.summary: Oil was mixed on Monday after renewed military strikes between the U.S. and Iran reignited concerns over crude supplies from the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bordelon Marine to Provide Commercial Support Vessel for the US Coast Guard
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Coast Guard has awarded a contract to Bordelon Marine to provide a commercial support vessel that will transport supplies, equipment and personnel to Coast Guard cutters operating in the Caribbean, Gulf of America, and other maritime…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon’s Rapid Delivery Push Triggers $15 Billion Rout for Eternal, Swiggy
top_signals.summary: Eternal Ltd. and Swiggy Ltd. got the 10-minute delivery party going in India. Now, e-commerce titans Amazon.com Inc. and Walmart Inc.’s Flipkart are looking to crash it.

top_signals.title: TDI-Brooks Completes Offshore Seismic, Geochemical Surveys
top_signals.summary: TDI-Brooks has successfully completed a 2D high-resolution shallow hazard seismic survey offshore Trinidad & Tobago. The acquired and processed lines support de-risking efforts for a planned offshore cluster installation, as well as the subsequent drilling of wells from this structure.
